description: Perfect for your little one, this fun bag from quechua is a great blend of practicality and style. Made of 50% recycled polyester and 50% PU coated polyester on the outer, and has a PU coated polyamide lining Has a 100% polyethylene foam padding Has one main zippered compartment with a fancy slider One front zippered compartment Print on the front for style Care only hand wash and drip dry in shade
